description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY using $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage named build and two jobs: build and build-master. Both jobs run the same script: docker build -t gcsfuse -f Dockerfile.gcsfuse ., docker run -v $PWD/linux_amd64:/linux_amd64 gcsfuse mv /go/bin/gcsfuse /linux_amd64, docker build --pull -t \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG\" ., and docker push \"$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_TAG\". The build job runs on all branches except master and sets IMAGE_TAG to $CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, while the build-master job runs only on the master branch and sets IMAGE_TAG to latest.
